'''ân-dh-zh''' ('''kanadhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dynamise|dynamise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dynamise|dynamise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kanadhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadhazh|thinadhazh]] || [[word:jinadhazh|jinadhazh]] || [[word:shinadhazh|shinadhazh]] || [[word:kinadhazh|kinadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadhazh|thuthunadhazh]] || [[word:jujunadhazh|jujunadhazh]] || [[word:shushunadhazh|shushunadhazh]] || [[word:kukunadhazh|kukunadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunadhazh|thunadhazh]] || [[word:junadhazh|junadhazh]] || [[word:shunadhazh|shunadhazh]] || [[word:kunadhazh|kunadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunadhazh|thunadhazh]] || [[word:junadhazh|junadhazh]] || [[word:shunadhazh|shunadhazh]] || [[word:kunadhazh|kunadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenadhazh|thenadhazh]] || [[word:jenadhazh|jenadhazh]] || [[word:shenadhazh|shenadhazh]] || [[word:kenadhazh|kenadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonadhazh|thothonadhazh]] || [[word:jojonadhazh|jojonadhazh]] || [[word:shoshonadhazh|shoshonadhazh]] || [[word:kokonadhazh|kokonadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhazh|thonadhazh]] || [[word:jonadhazh|jonadhazh]] || [[word:shonadhazh|shonadhazh]] || [[word:konadhazh|konadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhazh|thonadhazh]] || [[word:jonadhazh|jonadhazh]] || [[word:shonadhazh|shonadhazh]] || [[word:konadhazh|konadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnadhazh|thĂŠnadhazh]] || [[word:jĂŠnadhazh|jĂŠnadhazh]] || [[word:shĂŠnadhazh|shĂŠnadhazh]] || [[word:kĂŠnadhazh|kĂŠnadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanadhazh|thathanadhazh]] || [[word:jajanadhazh|jajanadhazh]] || [[word:shashanadhazh|shashanadhazh]] || [[word:kakanadhazh|kakanadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanadhazh|thanadhazh]] || [[word:janadhazh|janadhazh]] || [[word:shanadhazh|shanadhazh]] || [[word:kanadhazh|kanadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanadhazh|thanadhazh]] || [[word:janadhazh|janadhazh]] || [[word:shanadhazh|shanadhazh]] || [[word:kanadhazh|kanadhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanadhazh|shanadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanadhazh|goshanadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanadhazh|gokishanadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanadhazhnĂŒ|shanadhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnknĂŒ|goshanadhazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhnĂŒ|gokishanadhazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanadhazhshĂ«|shanadhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkshĂ«|goshanadhazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhshĂ«|gokishanadhazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhazhro|shanadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkro|goshanadhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhro|gokishanadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhazhmu|shanadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkmu|goshanadhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhmu|gokishanadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanadhazhsher|shanadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnksher|goshanadhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhsher|gokishanadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanadhazhng|shanadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkng|goshanadhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhng|gokishanadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanadhazhya|shanadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkya|goshanadhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhya|gokishanadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanadhazhyam|shanadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkyam|goshanadhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhyam|gokishanadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhazhnĂŒshĂ«|shanadhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanadhazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanadhazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhazhnĂŒro|shanadhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnknĂŒro|goshanadhazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhnĂŒro|gokishanadhazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhazhnĂŒmu|shanadhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnknĂŒmu|goshanadhazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhnĂŒmu|gokishanadhazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shanadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanadhazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanadhazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhazhshĂ«ro|shanadhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkshĂ«ro|goshanadhazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhshĂ«ro|gokishanadhazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhazhshĂ«mu|shanadhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkshĂ«mu|goshanadhazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhshĂ«mu|gokishanadhazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhazhronĂŒ|shanadhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkronĂŒ|goshanadhazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhronĂŒ|gokishanadhazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhazhroshĂ«|shanadhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkroshĂ«|goshanadhazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhroshĂ«|gokishanadhazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadhazhromu|shanadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkromu|goshanadhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhromu|gokishanadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadhazhmunĂŒ|shanadhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkmunĂŒ|goshanadhazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhmunĂŒ|gokishanadhazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadhazhmushĂ«|shanadhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkmushĂ«|goshanadhazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhmushĂ«|gokishanadhazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadhazhmuro|shanadhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadhazhnkmuro|goshanadhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadhazhmuro|gokishanadhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
